name: Girl Money Rush Game
description: Welcome to Girl Money Rush Game, an exciting endless runner adventure where you race forward, collect money, and grow your wealth while avoiding obstacles. Step into a fun and colorful world where quick reflexes and smart decisions help you collect cash, unlock upgrades, and reach the finish line with the highest rewards. This addictive running game combines fast-paced action, money collection challenges, and satisfying progression mechanics to create a thrilling gameplay experience. Perfect for players who enjoy runner games, casual challenges, and fun reward-based gameplay.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
